title: bytedance/deer-flow
abstract: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of ta
abstract_zh: 伙伴们，别再被繁琐的工作缠身了！试试咱们的**deer-flow**吧。它能帮你自动抓取数据、生成周报，调Bug也不在话下。以前写周报得熬夜苦思，现在只需一键搞定，岂不美哉？快来一起告别加班狗的日子，享受高效生活！
